summary: Integrated ADR 0205 into repo release 0.177.41 on top of the concurrent ADR 0208 mainline, replayed the governed ops-portal production path from the merged-main candidate, and promoted the contract-first capability catalog to canonical live platform state 0.130.39.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with jsonschema --with-requirements requirements/ops-portal.txt python -m pytest tests/test_capability_contracts.py tests/test_platform_manifest.py tests/test_interactive_ops_portal.py -q` returned `13 passed in 0.89s` on the integrated candidate.

`uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/workstream_surface_ownership.py --validate-registry --validate-branch --base-ref origin/main`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/capability_contracts.py --validate`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models generated-portals agent-standards` all passed before the final replay.

`LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 python3 scripts/release_manager.py --bump patch --platform-impact "bump platform version after the ADR 0205 merged-main ops-portal replay confirms the capability-contract catalog is live on top of the ADR 0208 mainline" --dry-run` reported current `0.177.40` and next `0.177.41`, and the non-dry-run invocation prepared release `0.177.41`.
`make immutable-guest-replacement-plan service=ops_portal` selected the ADR 0191 `preview_guest` path with a `180m` rollback window before the production replay.

`make live-apply-service service=ops_portal env=production ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true` completed successfully from `codex/ws-0205-main-final`, with the final recap reporting `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=99 changed=3 failed=0` and the playbook's local runtime health and root-render checks passing.

`curl -fsS https://ops.example.com/health` returned `{"status":"ok"}`, and `curl -sSI https://ops.example.com/` returned `HTTP/2 302` redirecting to `https://ops.example.com/oauth2/sign_in?rd=https://ops.example.com/` with the expected security headers.

The earlier same-day merged-main replay captured the deployed overview snippet showing `Capability Contracts`, `Identity Provider`, `Keycloak`, and the `ops.example.com · operator · shared-edge · platform-sso` publication line. That snippet is preserved under `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-28-adr-0205-overview-snippets.txt`; the final receipt write re-verified the public health and auth boundary even though the guest-local SSH jump path did not return from this environment.

notes: ADR 0208 landed on origin/main first, so this final ADR 0205 integration was recut as release 0.177.41 on top of origin/main commit `f7991a02cd1b` rather than the earlier 0.177.40 candidate.

The merged-main replay advanced the canonical live platform version from 0.130.38 to 0.130.39 because the ops portal surface changed on production after the capability-contract panel replay succeeded.

The final receipt write could re-verify the public edge directly, but the guest-local SSH jump path to docker-runtime-lv3 did not return from this environment; the preserved same-day overview snippet evidence therefore remains part of the branch alongside the fresh public probes.
